title: The real cost of LLM inference
shortdesc: An interactive model of what it actually costs to serve a large language model — and where the savings hide.
longdesc: A hands-on, interactive breakdown of LLM inference economics: GPU throughput, cost per million tokens, monthly spend, GPU trade-offs and the optimization techniques that move the needle. Drag the sliders and watch the numbers.
seoTitle: The real cost of LLM inference — an interactive model
seoDescription: Interactive breakdown of LLM inference cost: throughput, cost per million tokens, GPU trade-offs and the optimizations that actually save money.
